feature_tested: EchoAi3 File/PDF Ingestion Pipeline with AI Classification and Document Querying
summary: Comprehensive testing of the File/PDF Ingestion Pipeline. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Document Intelligence panel fully functional with document upload, AI classification, entity extraction, document querying, and delete functionality verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Items field shows '[object Object][object Object]...' instead of formatted array content when key_data contains nested objects/arrays
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Use JSON.stringify(v, null, 2) or custom formatter for array/object values instead of String(v)

endpoints: GET /api/echoai3/ingest/stats - returns total_documents, categories, supported_formats (pdf, csv, xlsx, txt, json, png, jpeg)
GET /api/echoai3/ingest/documents - returns document list with count and categories
POST /api/echoai3/ingest/upload - upload CSV with auto classification (classified as invoice with 98% confidence)
POST /api/echoai3/ingest/upload - upload TXT file with auto classification
POST /api/echoai3/ingest/upload - upload JSON file with auto classification
GET /api/echoai3/ingest/document/{doc_id}?include_text=true - get document with extracted text
GET /api/echoai3/ingest/document/{doc_id} - returns error for nonexistent doc
POST /api/echoai3/ingest/document/{doc_id}/query - ask question about document (AI answers correctly)
POST /api/echoai3/ingest/document/{doc_id}/query - returns error for nonexistent doc
DELETE /api/echoai3/ingest/document/{doc_id} - delete document and verify removal
DELETE /api/echoai3/ingest/document/{doc_id} - returns error for nonexistent doc
GET /api/zaro/status - ZARO Guardian still works with 5 subsystems after module archival

verified_elements: Document Intelligence header with FILE INGESTION PIPELINE subtitle
drop-zone - upload drop zone with file type indicators (PDF, CSV, XLSX, TXT, JSON)
doc-list - document list showing 1 docs with invoice (1) filter badge
Document item: test_invoice.csv with invoice category badge, 413B size, 98% confidence
Document detail pane with filename, category, size, file type, confidence
AI Summary section showing invoice details from Sysco Foods
Extracted Data section with Invoice Number, Vendor, Date, Invoice Total, Items
Entities Detected section with entity badges (Sysco Foods, INV-2026-001, etc.)
Action Items section with 3 actionable items
doc-query-input - Ask About This Document query input (data-testid)
doc-query-answer - Query answer display showing 'The total amount is 2564.00' (data-testid)
Tags section showing test, sysco, april tags
ui_features_verified: Doc Intelligence panel loads from sidebar under Analytics & AI section
Upload drop zone visible with supported file types
Document list shows uploaded documents with category badges and confidence scores
Clicking document shows detail pane with AI summary, key data, entities, action items
Ask About This Document query input sends question and shows AI answer
Close detail button closes the detail pane
Delete button visible on document hover

action_items: MINOR: Fix Items display in IngestionPanel - use JSON.stringify or custom formatter for nested objects/arrays instead of String(v) at line 279
critical_code_review_comments: The key_data display in IngestionPanel uses String(v) which doesn't handle nested objects/arrays properly - shows [object Object] instead of formatted content
seed_data_creation: Test documents created during testing were cleaned up via pytest fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: File/PDF Ingestion Pipeline is fully functional. All CRUD operations work correctly. AI classification correctly identifies document types (invoice, menu, contract, etc.) with high confidence. Document querying with AI works correctly. The only minor issue is the Items field in key_data showing [object Object] for nested arrays. 30 disconnected frontend modules were archived to /app/archive/disconnected_modules/ and the app still loads correctly. ZARO Guardian (tested in iteration_56) remains fully operational. Toast POS and QuickBooks integrations remain MOCKED with demo/sandbox data.

ai_classification_verified.csv_invoice: Classified as 'invoice' with 98% confidence, extracted vendor (Sysco Foods), date, items, total ($2564.00)

notes: All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend Document Intelligence panel fully verified with Playwright automation. The panel correctly displays document list, detail pane with AI summary, extracted data, entities, action items, and document querying. The AI correctly answers questions about uploaded documents. The app loads correctly after 30 modules were archived.
